cost_name: All-In Total CAPEX — Alkaline 100 MW Greenfield — Europe 2025 (Aggregated Benchmark)

estimation.estimation_method: Bottom-up aggregation of CS-ELC-007 + CS-ELI-001 + CS-HPR-002 + CS-CIV-002 + CS-IND-001/002/003/005. Validated against IRENA total system cost range (€1,010-1,840/kW). Central estimate consistent with Technology Card TC-ALK-001.

confidence.rationale: Aggregated from Class C components. Weighted confidence 0.62 (Medium). Consistent with IRENA range and TC-ALK-001.

primary_drivers: Contingency (11%, lower than PEM due to TRL 9)

sources.title: IRENA 2024 + IEA GHR 2025 aggregated total Alkaline CAPEX
sources.author: IRENA / IEA
